findings.title: Batch write access logs now expose every key instead of one representative key
findings.impact: For MCreate, this changed line passes the full key vector to ObjectKeysRef; the new formatter serializes each key up to the total log limit. Previously this path logged only keys[0], so a single batch write can now disclose many user-controlled object keys into access logs, which often have broader operational visibility and retention than request payloads.
findings.fix: Keep the previous exposure boundary for batch write operations by logging only a representative key or using ObjectKeysSummaryRef/count-only metadata unless operators explicitly opt into full batch-key logging.
